x011   |               |          x011----pi11----x111   |

(** Contents:
  * Definition of [PathCube]
  * [PathCube] reflexivity
  * [PathCube] face rewriting
  * [PathCube]s from paths between squares
  * [PathCube]s from squares
  * [PathCube] flipping
  * Kan fillers
  * [PathCube] concatenation
  * natural cubes from [ap]
*)


(** Homogeneous cubes *)
(** PathCube left right top bottom front back *)
(* TODO: ": rename" is needed because the default names changed in Rocq 9.2.0.  When the minimum supported version is >= 9.2.0, the ": rename" can be removed. *)
Scheme PathCube_ind := Induction for PathCube Sort Type.
(* TODO: ": rename" is needed because the default names changed in Rocq 9.2.0.  When the minimum supported version is >= 9.2.0, the ": rename" can be removed. *)
Scheme PathCube_rec := Minimality for PathCube Sort Type.
(* These notations make it easier to write our lemmas *)
(** [PathCube]s form a path of squares up to retyping *)

       with

           fun (px2 : x = x) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>

             return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
           with

     ((concat_1p p00i @

      (concat_p1 p01i)^)) @@h

contents:
(** Degenerate cubes formed from paths between squares *)

(** The first case is easiest to prove and can be written as equivalences *)

goals.conclusion: s = s' <~> PathCube s s' hr hr hr hr
s = s' <~> PathCube s s' hr hr hr hr
1 = s' <~> PathCube 1 s' hr hr hr hr

1 = s' <~>
tr (fv 1) @@h (hr @@h tr s') =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr))
  (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr)) hr

1 = s' <~>
sq_ccGG (concat_1p (1 @ 1))^ (concat_1p (1 @ 1))^ (1 @@h tr s') =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr))
  (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr)) hr

1 = s' <~>
sq_ccGG (concat_1p 1)^ (concat_1p 1)^ (tr s') =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr))
  (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr)) hr

1 = s' <~>
s' =
tr^-1
  (sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr))
     (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 hr)) hr)

contents:
(** This case can be reduced to the first by rotating the cube
    and rewriting some faces *)

goals.conclusion: s = s' <~> PathCube hr hr s s' vr vr
s = s' <~> PathCube hr hr s s' vr vr
s = s' <~> PathCube vr vr (tr hr) (tr hr) (tr s) (tr s')
s = s' <~> PathCube (tr s) (tr s') (tr vr) (tr vr) (tr (tr hr)) (tr (tr hr))
?Goal = tr vr
?Goal0 = tr vr
?Goal1 = tr (tr hr)
?Goal2 = tr (tr hr)
s = s' <~> PathCube (tr s) (tr s') ?Goal ?Goal0 ?Goal1 ?Goal2
?Goal = tr (tr hr)
?Goal0 = tr (tr hr)
s = s' <~> PathCube (tr s) (tr s') hr hr ?Goal ?Goal0
s = s' <~> PathCube (tr s) (tr s') hr hr hr hr
tr s = tr s' <~> PathCube (tr s) (tr s') hr hr hr hr

contents: (** Finally this is an even simpler rotation *)

goals.conclusion: s = s' <~> PathCube vr vr vr vr s s'
s = s' <~> PathCube vr vr vr vr s s'
s = s' <~> PathCube s s' (tr vr) (tr vr) (tr vr) (tr vr)
?Goal = tr vr
?Goal0 = tr vr
?Goal1 = tr vr
?Goal2 = tr vr
s = s' <~> PathCube s s' ?Goal ?Goal0 ?Goal1 ?Goal2
s = s' <~> PathCube s s' hr hr hr hr
